caption: A person prepares a recipe in a kitchen setting using a white electric stovetop. In a small inset window, a woman with short blonde hair wearing a black shirt is visible. A stainless steel pot sits on a burner, containing a light-colored liquid. A hand enters the frame, holding a measuring cup filled with a white powdered substance. As the sequence progresses, the hand tips the measuring cup, pouring the white powder into the pot. By the end of the clip, the powder has been added to the liquid, creating a pale, cloudy mixture. The woman in the inset continues to watch and speak as the cooking process unfolds. No text or logos are visible on the screen.
